name: Snappy Cocktail Meatballs with Honey Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all meatball ingredients; mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into 1-inch meatballs.
3. Place the meatballs in a shallow baking pan.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for 10-15 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, combine sauce ingredients.
6. Serve the meatballs on a plate with sauce and toothpicks.
7. This recipe makes about 30 meatballs.
